reviews.comment:
Son de cuarta , en mi vida vi personal más inútil incompetente y desinteresado por el cliente , el ACA debería tomar medida , habiendo tanta gente con ganas de trabajar que le den trabajo a esos inútiles es tristísimo

(Translated by Google)
They are fourth rate. I have never seen more useless, incompetent, and uninterested staff in the customer service. The ACA should take action. With so many people eager to work, giving work to these useless people is extremely sad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbVlLNVdBEAE
